guide.title: User Guide
guide.subtitle: A step-by-step walkthrough of everything you can do — from your first character to tracking every grind.
guide.footer: That's the whole flow. Log a few sessions and your dashboard will start telling you where the best gold is.

gettingStarted.title: Getting Started
steps: Here's the whole flow at a glance: register a character, log a grind session, then track your gold and efficiency on the dashboard. There's also a skill simulator you can try without signing in.
Expand any section below to see the exact steps for that part.
You can switch the language (English / ไทย) and set a display name anytime in Settings.

characters.title: Register Your Characters
steps: Go to Characters and click “+ New Character”.
Enter a name, pick a class, set the level, then Create.
Use Edit to update a character. A character that already has recorded sessions can't be deleted until you remove those sessions first.

grind.title: Track a Grind Session
steps: Open the Grind Tracker.
Select the dungeon and the character you farmed with, and set the run duration in hours and minutes.
Fill in “Gold Drop” — the raw Gold/Silver/Copper you picked up during the run.
For each item you looted, enter the quantity and price each; the subtotal and total value are calculated for you.
Check the Summary (total value and value per hour), then click “Save Session”.

sessions.title: Review Your Sessions
steps: Open Sessions to see every run you've logged.
Filter by character or a date range, and sort by newest or highest gold.
Edit a session or its item drops inline, or delete runs you no longer want.
Click “Export Excel” to download the filtered sessions as a spreadsheet.

dashboard.title: Read Your Dashboard
steps: The Dashboard summarizes your total value, hours, value per hour and favourite dungeon.
Use the date range (7 days, 30 days, all, or custom) to focus the charts.
“Best Farming Spots” ranks dungeons by gold per hour so you know where to farm next.
Per-character stats and the gold chart show how you're progressing over time.

skills.title: Skill Simulator & Community Builds
steps: Open Skills and pick a class — no sign-in needed to browse or plan a build.
Set your character level and click skills to allocate SP; prerequisites and level requirements are checked live.
Use “Copy link” to share your plan instantly, or sign in and hit Save to keep it on your account with a short share link.
Tick “Share to community” when saving to publish your build in the public gallery.
Browse Community Builds to search other players' builds by class, like and comment on them, or clone one to tweak your own version.

support.title: Support the Project (optional)
steps: Open Support to donate via PromptPay QR or TrueMoney Wallet.
Enter an amount (minimum ฿10), your display name and an optional message, then pay.
Confirmed donations appear on the supporters wall. Donating is entirely optional and only helps cover server costs.

tickets.title: Report a Problem
steps: Hit a bug or need help? Open “Report a Problem” and click “New Ticket”.
Describe the issue, attach a screenshot if it helps, then submit.
Open a ticket to chat with the team — a red badge appears on the menu when an admin replies.
Once the team marks the ticket as closed, it becomes read-only.

settings.title: Personalize
steps: In Settings you can set a Display Name that's shown across the app.
Switch the language between English and ไทย at any time — your choice is remembered.
